title: Horde Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Zombie Horde Moon
body:
![Horde Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e4ffbddb2b440b8c30c94d163ccf24928ad8188.png)
During the rare Horde Moon event, the weight of zombie spawns will be greatly increased, and during a Super Horde Moon, all mob spawns will increase by a large amount as well, leading to a world overrun by the walking dead.

Just for fun, try it with [The Hordes](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-hordes)

 All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco.

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
